title: App Settings - General - About - New update available
scenario: App update flow from About screen opens Release Notes and app store correctly in Poly Lens Mobile
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner.
4. Observe the 'App Updates Needed' text, an 'Update' button, current and available firmware versions, and a link to Release Notes.
6. Verify that the Poly Lens Mobile release notes page opens.
7. Tap the 'X' button to close the Release Notes.
8. Verify that the app returns to the General section with About expanded.
10. Verify that the app store page for Poly Lens opens.
expected: 1. The 'App Updates Needed' text, 'Update' button, current and available firmware versions, and Release Notes link are displayed in the About section. 2. Tapping the Release Notes link opens the Poly Lens Mobile release notes page. 3. Tapping the 'X' button closes the Release Notes and returns to the General section with About expanded. 4. Tapping the 'Update' button opens the app store page for Poly Lens.
